title: senecio teliformis
intro: Senecio teliformis, also known as Bear's Head Woolly Senecio, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to reduce swelling and prevent infection. The health benefits of Senecio teliformis include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
